creator: CyberRax@Yahoo.com
text:
Official version on Sourceforge hasn't been updated in almost 2 years and currently the updates for MalwarePatrol and SecuriteInfo are not working due to changes at those providers. I'm suggesting switching from the original to the fork by eXtremeSHOK at https://github.com/extremeshok/clamav-unofficial-sigs
It's being maintained and has been modifed to work with the newer signature updates.
